arts.ttl: Report: Nottingham Forest told to sign £7m Leeds United star in January amid Andrew Omobamidele links
arts.sum: Would you want him Forest fans?

arts.ttl: Spurs players Postecoglou must build his team around to save his job
arts.sum: One of the best defenders in the Premier League on his day and boy how Tottenham have missed him at the heart of their defence. After Christmas he will likely see some important players returning to the first team setup and there are certain players in the squad that Postecoglou needs to call upon and build his team around to ensure he remains in a job and gets Tottenham moving on up the Premier League table.

arts.ttl: Spurs 'need to reinforce' in January - Postecoglou
arts.sum: Tottenham are "short in a couple of areas" and "need to reinforce" during the January transfer window, says Ange Postecoglou.

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou, Nuno Espirito Santo, and the yearn for perfection in an age that lacks respect
arts.sum: Tottenham’s ex-boss is thriving at Nottingham Forest ahead of Boxing Day reunion

arts.ttl: 'He was a great player': Archie Gray now names Leeds icon as one of his two idols alongside Lionel Messi

arts.ttl: Nottingham Forest vs Tottenham TV channel, live stream details, highlights and kick-off time
arts.sum: Tottenham head to Nottingham Forest on Boxing Day in search of a much-needed win after another disappointing defeat in the Premier League. Despite conceding SIX times against Liverpool, Ange Postecoglou's side were once again bright going forward and have now scored the most goals in the Premier League this season with 39 from 17 matches.

arts.ttl: Yuri Alberto gives ultimatum to Nottingham Forest ahead of January after Memphis Depay text
